name: Orange Coconut Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix well with the rest of the ingredients except coconut and dates.
3. Blend in the coconut and dates.
4. Spread the mixture into a 7x11-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Allow to cool, then cut into squares.
7. If desired, sprinkle with powdered sugar.
